value.rationale: The fetched page is a CLI troubleshooting guide for the Antigravity CLI tool. It covers topics such as shell PATH configuration, keyring permissions, clipboard forwarding, and self-updater locks. There is no mention anywhere on the page of a "Chat-surface integration" or the ability to drive an agent from chat/issue tools such as Slack, Linear, or channels. The claim is not substantiated by the page content.
